mapper.sql: l.id, l.member_id AS memberId, l.store_id AS storeId, l.rule_id AS ruleId, l.attendance_count AS attendanceCount, l.purchase_count AS purchaseCount, l.intention_reason AS intentionReason, l.experience_coupon_status AS experienceCouponStatus, l.follow_status AS followStatus, l.follow_by AS followBy, DATE_FORMAT(l.last_follow_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastFollowTime, DATE_FORMAT(l.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(l.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt, (SELECT nickname FROM user_info WHERE userId = l.member_id) AS memberName, (SELECT phone FROM user_info WHERE userId = l.member_id) AS memberMobile, (SELECT storeName FROM store WHERE storeId = l.store_id) AS storeName, (SELECT username FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = l.follow_by) AS followByName

sql.if: AND l.member_id IN (SELECT userId FROM user_info WHERE nickname LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.update: UPDATE pt_group_to_private_lead SET experience_coupon_status = 1 WHERE id = #{leadId} AND experience_coupon_status = 0 AND follow_status != 2
UPDATE pt_group_to_private_lead SET follow_status = #{followStatus}, follow_by = #{followBy}, last_follow_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{leadId}
